title: Migrate the ad-hoc decomposed JSON project state into pi-context, with project-shaped block kinds
description: Design (from the project, not the stock kinds) for moving the home-rolled context-migration/decomposed/*.json state into the pi-context substrate. Seven project-shaped block kinds, each derived from the real ad-hoc item shapes: decisions (DEC-N: id, num, title?, body, refs[], continuation[], raw; no status — supersession is a relation); discoveries (full DISC shape; resolution derived from resolved_by presence; category an open string-enum); story (multi-namespace US-/US-ORG-/.../US-DRAFT- under one kind; status pending|enabled|vivified; enabling_phase + vivifying_commit); orchestrator-log (append-only seq/timestamp/type/text/refs; type stays free prose, with an optional event_class facet populated going forward only, never back-fill-guessed); pending-actions (base seq/status(open|done)/priority/item/evidence required-minimal, plus the focus-only optional narrative fields arc/next_step/slice_status/...); subagent-invocations (seq/sha?/context/text/kind); slice-facts (generalized with an arc field so it is reusable across arcs). Mandates fold into the existing conventions block via a class:mandate facet — no separate mandates kind (kills the MANDATES.json-vs-conventions duplicate). The load-bearing principle: prose fields keep their content verbatim (lossless) and relations are an additive overlay parsed out of those prose fields — relations are never the only home for a fact.
motivation: Enacts pi-context adoption (DEC-47) for the orchestration state, with the substrate shape following the project (new kinds welcome, no contorting to the stock 17). Replaces the home-rolled state.mjs surface (no schema validation, no referential integrity, no first-class relations) with schema-validated blocks + closure-table relations + content-addressed version chains.
acceptance_criteria: DECs → decisions, DISCs → a new discoveries kind, US-STATUS → story (status pending|enabled|vivified + enabling_phase + vivifying_commit), ORCHESTRATOR-LOG → an append-only orchestrator-log kind, pending-actions → a pending-actions kind preserving the open|done + single priority:next focus contract and the optional focus-narrative fields, subagent-invocations → its own kind, slice-facts → an arc-scoped kind.
Mandates are deduped into conventions (a class facet); no separate mandates block; MANDATES.json becomes a derived view.

The 5 line-decomposed document files (00-preamble, phase.phases, phase.phase-tasks, PHASE-LAUNCH-CHECKLIST, source-model-gaps) stay frozen raw-fidelity archive — not entity blocks (they are document structure, not queryable entities; verify-decomposed.mjs proves them lossless).

Relations are an additive overlay parsed from the prose fields; the prose stays verbatim on the item. Substrate-internal edges (DISC resolved_by DEC, DEC references DEC/DISC, slice-fact for arc DEC) are buildable now; the *_by_commit edges are deferred pending the commit-as-first-class decision.

Invariants turned on at zero legacy cost: exactly one priority:next among open pending-actions; pending-actions.status in {open,done}. The story/DISC edge invariants are deferred to the edge-building decision (legacy resolved_by prose is not uniformly parseable → encode as warn, not hard reject).

The live state.mjs session-start tooling re-points to substrate queries (filter-block-items / read-block-page), run dual until the substrate queries reconstruct identical results, then cut over the CLAUDE.md session-start steps.
Per DEC-47 the standing-up is performed externally; this item is the shape to build to.
